output.text:
To simplify $\sqrt{242}$, we factorize 242 into its prime factors:
$$\sqrt{242} = \sqrt{2 \cdot 121}$$
Since 121 is a perfect square ($11^2$), we can simplify further:
$$\sqrt{2 \cdot 121} = \sqrt{2 \cdot 11^2}$$
$$\sqrt{2 \cdot 11^2} = \sqrt{2} \cdot \sqrt{11^2}$$
$$\sqrt{2} \cdot \sqrt{11^2} = \sqrt{2} \cdot 11$$
$$\sqrt{2} \cdot 11 = 11\sqrt{2}$$ ки
So, the simplified form of $\sqrt{242}$ is $\boxed{11\sqrt{2}}$. ки
